case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,569.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,569.00 U.S. CURRENCY $425.00 U.S. CURRENCY 1989 HARLEY DAVIDSON, CALIFORNIA LICENSE 15T8482, FRAME #1HD1EBL36KY122176, ENGINE #A04343 DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: 1989 HARLEY DAVIDSON, CALIF LICENSE 15T8482, FRAME #1HD1EBL36KY122176, ENGINE #A04343 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DEBORAH JENNINGS, UPON PAYMENT OF $3,000.00 US CURRENCY TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT SAID PAYMENT OF $3,000.00 US CURRENCY, REFERENCED IN THE ABOVE PARAGRAPH & $4,994.00 US CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
